page_content:
Formerly: PUAF742.

PLCY743 Ecological Economics (3 Credits)

Explores how taking account of the economic system's fundamental dependence on the environment alters conventional economic goals, priorities, theories, and prescriptions.

Restriction: Must be in a major in PLCY-School of Public Policy; or permission of PLCY-School of Public Policy.

Credit Only Granted for. PLCY743 or PUAF743.
